progress.title: There're no progress metrics to show yet.
progress.description: Start setting property values in Compliance Tasks to see progress metrics here.

updates.title: No updates yet.
updates.description: Once IPO Workspace members add updates it will appear here

search.title: No matching results.
search.description: No results found. Try adjusting your search terms.

not_found.title: Oops! Something seems wrong
not_found.description: We are unable to fetch your Trinity Intelligence account currently. This might be a network error.

server_error.title: Server error
server_error.description: We are unable to connect and fetch data from our server. Don't worry, we are working on it.

no_access.title: Seems like you don’t have access to this IPO Workspace
no_access.restricted_description: Contact admin to request for access and you can continue here.
no_access.join_description: Click the button below to join it.

invalid_project.title: IPO Workspace not found
invalid_project.description: The IPO Workspace you are looking for does not exist.

work_items.title: Start with your first Compliance Task.
work_items.description: Compliance Tasks are the building blocks of your IPO Workspace — assign owners, set priorities, and track progress easily.

cycles.title: Group and timebox Compliance Tasks in IPO Readiness.
cycles.description: Break work down by timeboxed chunks, work backwards from your IPO Workspace deadline to set dates, and make tangible progress as a team.

cycle_work_items.title: No Compliance Tasks to show in this IPO Readiness
cycle_work_items.description: Create Compliance Tasks to begin monitoring your team's progress this IPO Readiness and achieve your goals on time.

modules.title: Map your IPO Workspace goals to Tasks and track easily.
modules.description: Tasks are made up of interconnected Compliance Tasks. They assist in monitoring progress through IPO Workspace phases, each with specific deadlines and Risk Assessment to indicate how close you are to achieving those phases.

module_work_items.title: No Compliance Tasks to show in this Task
module_work_items.description: Create Compliance Tasks to begin monitoring this Task.

views.title: Save custom Compliance Flags for your IPO Workspace
views.description: Compliance Flags are saved filters that help you quickly access the information you use most. Collaborate effortlessly as teammates share and tailor Compliance Flags to their specific needs.

no_work_items_in_project.title: No Compliance Tasks in the IPO Workspace yet
no_work_items_in_project.description: Add Compliance Tasks to your IPO Workspace and slice Compliance Tasks into trackable pieces with Compliance Flags.

work_item_filter.title: No Compliance Tasks found
work_item_filter.description: Your current filter didn't return any results. Try changing the filters.

pages.title: Document everything — from notes to PRDs
pages.description: Company Records let you capture and organize information in one place. Write meeting notes, IPO Workspace documentation, and PRDs, embed Compliance Tasks, and structure them with ready-to-use components.

archive_pages.title: No archived Company Records yet
archive_pages.description: Archive Company Records not on your radar. Access them here when needed.

intake_sidebar.title: Log Intake requests
intake_sidebar.description: Submit new requests to be reviewed, prioritized, and tracked within your IPO Workspace's workflow.

intake_main.title: Select an Intake Compliance Task to view its details

epics.title: Turn complex IPO Workspaces into structured epics.
epics.description: An epic helps you organize big goals into smaller, trackable Compliance Tasks.

epic_work_items.title: You haven't added Compliance Tasks to this epic yet.
epic_work_items.description: Start by adding some Compliance Tasks to this epic and track them here.

archive_epics.title: No archived epics yet
archive_epics.description: You can archive epics that are IPO Ready or cancelled. Find them here once archived.

archive_work_items.title: No archived Compliance Tasks yet
archive_work_items.description: Manually or through automation, you can archive Compliance Tasks that are IPO Ready or cancelled. Find them here once archived.

archive_cycles.title: No archived IPO Readiness yet
archive_cycles.description: To tidy up your IPO Workspace, archive IPO Ready IPO Readiness. Find them here once archived.

archive_modules.title: No archived Tasks yet
archive_modules.description: To tidy up your IPO Workspace, archive IPO Ready or cancelled Tasks. Find them here once archived.

home_widget_quick_links.title: Keep important references, resources, or docs handy for Compliance Tasks

inbox_sidebar_all.title: Updates for your subscribed Compliance Tasks will appear here

inbox_sidebar_mentions.title: Mentions for Compliance Tasks items will appear here

views.title: No Compliance Flags yet
views.description: Add Compliance Tasks to your IPO Workspace and use Compliance Flags to filter, sort, and monitor progress effortlessly.

drafts.title: Half-written Compliance Tasks
drafts.description: To try this out, start adding a Compliance Task and leave it mid-way or create your first Generated Document below. 😉

projects_archived.title: No IPO Workspaces archived
projects_archived.description: Looks like all your IPO Workspaces are still active—great job!

analytics_projects.title: Create IPO Workspaces to visualize IPO Workspace metrics here.

analytics_work_items.title: Create IPO Workspaces with Compliance Tasks and assignees to start tracking performance, progress, and team impact here.

analytics_no_cycle.title: Create IPO Readiness to organise work into time-bound phases and track progress across sprints.

analytics_no_module.title: Create Tasks to organize Compliance Tasks and track progress across different stages.

analytics_no_intake.title: Set up intake to manage incoming requests and track how they're accepted and rejected

home_widget_stickies.title: Jot down an idea, capture an aha, or record a brainwave. Add a sticky to get started.

stickies.title: Capture ideas instantly
stickies.description: Create stickies for quick notes and to-dos, and keep them with you wherever you go.

active_cycles.title: No active IPO Readiness
active_cycles.description: You don't have any ongoing IPO Readiness right now. Active IPO Readiness appear here when they include today's date.

dashboard.title: Visualize your progress with dashboards
dashboard.description: Build customizable dashboards to track metrics, measure outcomes, and present insights effectively.

wiki.title: Write a note, a doc, or a full knowledge base.
wiki.description: Company Records are thought spotting space in Trinity Intelligence. Take down meeting notes, format them easily, embed Compliance Tasks, lay them out using a library of components, and keep them all in your IPO Workspace's context.

project_overview_state_sidebar.title: Enable IPO Workspace states
project_overview_state_sidebar.description: Enable IPO Workspace States to view and manage properties like state, priority, due dates and more.

estimates.title: No estimates yet
estimates.description: Define how your team measures effort and track it consistently across all Compliance Tasks.

labels.description: Create personalized labels to effectively categorize and manage Compliance Tasks items.

exports.title: No exports yet
exports.description: You don't have any export records right now. Once you export data, all records will appear here.

tokens.description: Generate secure API tokens to connect your workspace with external systems and applications.

workspace_tokens.description: Generate secure API tokens to connect your workspace with external systems and applications.

webhooks.title: No Webhook added yet
webhooks.description: Automate notifications to external services when IPO Workspace events occur.

work_item_types.title: Create and customize Compliance Task types
work_item_types.description: Define unique Compliance Task types for your IPO Workspace. Each type can have its own properties, workflows, and fields - tailored to your IPO Workspace and team's needs.

work_item_type_properties.title: Define the property and details you want to capture for this Compliance Task type. Customize it to match your IPO Workspace's workflow.

templates.description: Reduce setup time by creating templates for Compliance Tasks, and Company Records — and start new work in seconds.

recurring_work_items.title: No recurring Compliance Task yet
recurring_work_items.description: Set up recurring Compliance Tasks to automate repeat Compliance Tasks and stay on schedule effortlessly.

worklogs.title: Track timesheets for all members
worklogs.description: Log time on Compliance Tasks to view detailed timesheets for any team member across IPO Workspaces.

template_setting.description: Reduce setup time by creating templates for IPO Workspaces, Compliance Tasks, and Company Records — and start new work in seconds.
